title: Issuch's Blazes x Fresh Animations
description: Blazes variants compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f6cbe6e30f50da94aff2eb76fdb68c440eb46c7.png)
![https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be27fc74ec25823c7ae6c0205038b3d419f4d7b3.png)
![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5267ff7a4de63cacf0d3520d0ab27fdc58865810.png)
![PlanetMinecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40e6888d1cdef25608cef172d1e9ca76ae61e3f2.png)

[Discord](https://discord.gg/2GaXAPGCxE) 


________________________________________________
I present to you the texture pack: Issuchs's Blazes x Fresh Animations. Diversify your game with these high-quality textures!
The set adds variants of blazes mobs, where models and textures appear randomly.


<details>
<summary>Example 1</summary>

![Example 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38683d193e1485c1c5336238d36b962965449f05.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Example 2</summary>
  
![Example 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02cbdc3a0aa63700416e694ff4cccbdaae55d0a3.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Example 3</summary>
  
![Example 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a274dbda0c6ae87712aeb14c8ba17129a8da568_0.webp)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Set contents:</summary>
  
- Regular with short sticks
- Two painted on the model with four rotating shields
</details>

If you want to experience the texture pack to its fullest, use [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).

This mob texture pack **also** works without Fresh Animations.

Then put the texture pack **HIGHER** Fresh Animations!!
![Higher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a8ef535a08c1edd970878fc8dfcb8d7c38df82c.png)
